fields.name: Start Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the start date of the VAT return period.

fields.name: End Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the end date of the VAT return period.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the due date for the VAT return period.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the VAT return period.

fields.name: Received Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT return period received date.

fields.name: VAT Return No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the associated VAT return.
